authority.department: Department of Labour, Employment, Training & Skill Development, Government of Jharkhand

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Jharkhand.

rules.title: Review Jharkhand Shops and Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the applicable Jharkhand Shops and Establishments legislation is required.

citations.reference: Applicable Jharkhand Shops and Establishments legislation

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and prescribed notices under Jharkhand labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under applicable labour legislation.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Jharkhand provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Applicable Jharkhand Shops and Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Minimum Wage Notifications
rules.description: Ensure employee wages comply with the latest minimum wage notifications applicable in Jharkhand.

rules.title: Review Labour Welfare Requirements
rules.description: Review state labour welfare requirements, notifications and employer obligations applicable in Jharkhand.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual review of registrations, statutory records, wage compliance and inspection readiness.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for statutory filings, inspections, licence renewals and labour law due dates.
